task_description: Fix three pages going black when selected (/ai-care-plans, /consent-manager, /digital-twin), add error handling to prevent crashes, add global React error boundary, and ensure seed-demo.ts generates 30 days of demo data for all innovative feature tables.

verification.summary: Frontend build (tsc + vite) successful. Backend build (tsc) successful. No test suite configured for this project. Review issues 1-3 addressed in follow-up commit.
